scripts.lint: tsc --noEmit -p packages/ce/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/playground/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build: bun run --filter @ga-ut/ce build && bun run build:compat && bun run --filter @ga-ut/ce-playground build
scripts.build:compat: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R packages/ce/dist/. dist/
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run test:events && npm run docs:validate && npm run pack:check
